overview: Advanced Phishing Awareness Training System — an interactive cybersecurity education platform with dark glassmorphism UI, phishing simulation labs, an interactive quiz with certificate generation, security awareness modules covering 8+ topics, and a statistics dashboard.
features: Dark theme with glassmorphism and neon cybersecurity styling
8 security awareness topic modules (phishing, smishing, vishing, 2FA, and more)
Interactive fake email analyzer with red-flag highlighting
URL safety checker with phishing risk meter
Interactive quiz with automatic scoring and pass/fail system
Certificate generation after passing the quiz
Animated cards, progress indicators, sticky navigation, smooth scrolling
Cybersecurity tips popup and animated phishing alerts
